hooks.command: sh -c 'file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$file" ] && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; case "$file" in *.js) npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0'

sh -c 'file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$file" in .env*|*/.env*) echo "BLOCKED: Access to .env files is restricted." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'
